variants: Eudoxie Vauthier has made her mark in the field of paleoclimatology and currently calls Lilacgrove Reserve her home. For her exemplary work, she was awarded the Opaline Lantern Recognition, which celebrates her contributions to understanding ancient climate dynamics. Beyond her research, Eudoxie authored the insightful Solaris Gold Compendium, providing an exploration of climatic variations throughout history. In addition, she plays an active role in the Ultramarine Fencers League, embracing her enthusiasm for the sport of fencing. Eudoxie's blend of scholarly accomplishments and athletic pursuits exemplifies her well-rounded character.
